details.productUrlName: Siege Gang Lieutenant Extended Art Ripple Foil

customAttributes.description:
Lieutenant — At the beginning of combat on your turn, if you control your commander, create two 1/1 red Goblin creature tokens. Those tokens gain haste until end of turn.
2, Sacrifice a Goblin: Siege-Gang Lieutenant deals 1 damage to any target.
customAttributes.detailNote: This product is a Presale item with an estimated shipping date of 6/14/2024. Please keep in mind card details, including rarity and card name, may change up until release date as information is updated.
customAttributes.flavorText: His crew proudly maintains an accident rate of 100% per day.
